name_cn:
#Medium Signature Bucket Bag in Grey
This Signature Bucket Bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, featuring a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from grey calfskin, it is accented with matching grained calfskin details and a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious compartment features a snap closure and leather strap opening, with an interior slip pocket for added refinement. The medium size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing for easy carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Calfskin metal snap and leather strap closure
Top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Interior slip pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 24x21x14 cm (LxHxW)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick
